reasoning: Prakriti leans Pitta-Kapha due to lifelong tendencies like strong appetite, oily skin, and overweight with central obesity. Vikriti shows marked Pitta excess (heartburn, burning pain, inflamed skin, anger) and Kapha aggravation (sinus congestion, sluggishness, sticky sweat, psoriasis). Dietary habits (fried, spicy, dairy, sweets) further aggravate Pitta and Kapha.
